figures.caption: Figure 1: (a) Empirical sampling distributions µ̃c induced by the Christoffel function for prompts c ∈ {cuc, csb, cdb, cca}. Color indicates sampling probability over Fourier frequencies. (b) Empirical prompt compatibility factor Λ̃(cr, cr, cs) (rows: sampling, columns: recovery). Diagonal entries that represent κ̃ are minimal, while off-diagonal entries indicate the sampling-recovery mismatch penalty.
Figure 2: Reconstruction quality across sampling percentages by sampling distribution for the inrange prompt-mismatched experiment.

Figure 5: Empirical sampling distributions µ̃c induced by the Christoffel function for prompts c ∈ {csb, cdb, cca} across varying CFG scales. Color indicates sampling probability over Fourier frequencies.
Figure 6: Reconstruction performance versus sampling percentage for in-range prompt-mismatched recovery under varying CFG scales, including unconditioned baseline.
Figure 3: Reconstruction quality across sampling percentages by sampling distribution for the out-ofrange experiment.
Figure 8: Reconstruction performance versus sampling percentage for in-range prompt-matched recovery under varying CFG scales, including unconditioned baseline.
Figure 7: Reconstruction performance versus sampling percentage for out-of-range recovery under varying CFG scales, including unconditioned baseline.
